[视频号|#光影酿情人生有味 #五粮液 #IDAEXPO #以片会友 这不是一次传统的干杯，而是一场由自我主导的感官幻境。以29度的微醺为引，解码年轻一代“我乐意”的绝对主场。故事跟随一位气场从容、极具静奢风的年轻女性展开。在极简的高级吧台前，她随性地将青柠与覆盆子投入天青色的酒液中。 伴随着有机电音的律动，每一次食材的碰撞，都引发一次震撼的视觉穿梭——从水雾弥漫的“奇幻雨林”，到光影迷离的“微醺霓虹之城”。结合好莱坞级的微观流体特效与极致的产品边缘扫光，短片在现实与幻境中无缝切换。](http://wxapp.tc.qq.com/251/20302/stodownload?encfilekey=Cvvj5Ix3eewK0tHtibORqcsqchXNh0Gf3sJcaYqC2rQBggfXNgdriaBkMxxk00ERdK6aaEcXJzg5E9wqs3d6UwaooAOSl8A2kPRX4nMuKPf0dkXH9M95VL2wepqFES8oyc&bizid=1023&dotrans=0&hy=SH&idx=1&m=&uzid=7a166&token=ic1n0xDG6awicZsltsjyFAeOgjvHib7fy09trQ5yDADuDKmmNv24hY1ulBXVg7xVcygZn1NJJ8kbFRO0Uo3gOWicDiaZ7QKb8pLqfCcUicnQflK8Um5hJbt5ibG9SVX4mjXIBQqjN7YkmeamznFdIItIXzQm44priabHjm2HQ3iaF1PnHf5Wr1PFHMHP0TXjdp09KtdgJjbsZlIjdMNgOCgDmTKQVzWRnrsIxhZM5wic1TgiatHs1E&basedata=CAMSBnhXVDEwMSIzCgoKBnhXVDEwMRAACgoKBnhXVDEwMRAACgcKA3hWMBAACgcKA3hBMBAACgcKA3hBMhAAMAE&sign=DnQHat0FhXn9kL9fX0dwVj1azWJCEksYHl7h2oVUGdMAssLpYJqv610NJzGCTnBm-iH_skmYchP2H31dSEmGEA&extg=4ec700&ftype=8&svrbypass=AAuL%2FQsFAAABAAAAAADX%2F%2FSP0k2jG%2Bhm%2FbTqaRAAAADnaHZTnGbFfAj9RgZXfw6VM6LHE%2Bi5HmMvfH6BWJoW3pDCz2pQdED8bS3fWbVVmWY2PtFAnH96cFg%3D&svrnonce=1776989437)
